_comment: Category classification patterns (regex, case-insensitive, matched against part names). First match wins, in list order. Community-extensible. The special 'custom_series' block clusters in-house/custom parts that share a drawing-number prefix (e.g. 301065_P024, 301065_P025 -> 'Custom Machined (301065)'); these dominate real industrial assemblies and otherwise stay unclassified.

custom_series._comment: If a part name starts with a numeric drawing-number prefix like '301065_P024' or '301066_p005', cluster by the leading number. Regex must capture the series id in group 1.
custom_series.label: Custom Machined ({series})
